title: The Chartered Accountant Journal — May 2026
synopsis: Monthly flagship journal covering auditing standards, GST developments, corporate governance, and professional ethics for members and students.

title: Handbook on Audit & Assurance 2026
synopsis: Comprehensive reference for auditors on standards, quality management, and reporting obligations effective for audits of financial statements for periods beginning on or after 1 April 2026.

title: GST Compendium — Q1 2026
synopsis: Quarterly compendium of GST notifications, FAQs, and worked examples for practitioners and industry finance teams.

title: Draft Ethics Circular (Internal)
synopsis: Internal draft — not for public distribution until approved by Council.
